channel.title: Wall Tiles on Kitchen Remodel Ideas
channel.description: Recent content in Wall Tiles on Kitchen Remodel Ideas

item.title: Selecting the Best Wall Tiles
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description: Picture yourself finding a charming mid-century modern with three bedrooms and two baths. The real estate agent guides you through a spacious living room with high ceilings and plenty of room over the hooded range and sink. You glide through some of the coolest rooms you’ve ever been in and you can’t wait to call the owner to put in an offer. Everything is perfect until you get to the kitchen and all of a sudden it’s “Hello 70’s”! Nobody likes an outdated kitchen design. It’s one of the parts of the house you’ll be spending the majority of your time in - cooking, cleaning, and entertaining guests. But you wouldn’t want to entertain anyone in a “That’s 70’s Kitchen”. Well, this happens to a lot of new homeowners and we’ve based our blog to answer the question: “How to select the best wall tiles?” to turn that 70’s look into modern day. If you are going at this alone or you are working with an interior designer whose job it is to give you quality design concepts, this blog will surely help you along your way to a beautiful, updated kitchen.

item.title: Countertops vs. Backsplash
item.author: chris@kitchenremodelideas.com (Kitchen Remodel Ideas)
item.description:
Your kitchen wouldn’t be complete without countertops and wall tiles. When arranging the design elements and architectural features, the colors don’t have to match, they ought to be balanced. 



Complimentary Color Theme


You’re not going to love your kitchen backsplash tiles if they do not suit the color of your countertops. Ideally, colors complement, harmonize, and enhance cohesion across the room’s visual plane.
